subcodes.first_line: O loving friends! Your letter dated the nineteenth of Sha'ban of this year hath been received [3.5s]... ...You have expressed happiness on account of the return of ‘Abdu'l-Baha to Haifa and Acca. It was some time
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان نامه نوزدهم ١٩ شعبان سنه حالیه وصول یافت از عودت عبدالبهاء بحیفا
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
